name: ambiguous-server-prefix
query: Add conditional logic to hide the 'business type' question unless the user selected 'self-employed' on our capital statement form.
expected_behavior: Checks which server prefix is available (mcp__tally__* vs mcp__claude_ai_Tally__*) before assuming apply_logic is missing
Recognizes apply_logic is only exposed on the claude_ai_Tally server and does not incorrectly claim conditional logic is impossible
Follows load_form -> configure_blocks (default-hide) -> apply_logic -> save_form sequence
_notes: Edge case: tests the stale 'apply_logic UI-only' gotcha doesn't cause a wrong refusal, and the prefix-detection decision gate fires.
